title: fraxinus lanuginosa f. velutina
intro: Fraxinus lanuginosa f. velutina, also known as the velvet ash, is a variant of the Fraxinus lanuginosa plant, a species of ash tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of certain flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The velvet ash is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the Fraxinus lanuginosa f. velutina plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various ailments.
